  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-im/loudmouth     Makefile 
  Log:
  Add libidn dependency with no option provide. There is no option to disable
  and enable, which it's a auto-check in configure. The libidn is small. Bump
  the PORTREVISION.
